category_sources: Official Cua docs describe Lume as a macOS VM CLI/framework using Apple's Virtualization Framework on Apple Silicon.
source_facts.description: Create and manage Apple Silicon-native virtual machines.
display_name_sources: Official Cua documentation page is titled What is Lume?
docs_sources: Official Cua docs provide the Lume guide; official GitHub repository contains a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already set to https://github.com/trycua/cua; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Cua docs say Lume is a VM runtime for AI agents, CI/CD pipelines, and automating macOS on Apple Silicon.
